LAW AND MOTION 301, MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -- DEFENDANT SAGEPOINT CLEANERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED; SAN FRANCISCO IS A PROPER VENUE BECAUSE THE CONTRACT WAS FORMED HERE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND ARGUE. THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT INTERTAIN ARGUMENT ON THE MATTER. OPPOSING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Kevin J. Moore and Defendant in Propria Persona Jae Bong Chung for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Notice of Bankruptcy on file. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Set For Trial On Feb-22-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-27-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 306

Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Aug-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: Christopher Overton, Esq. of Moore & Associates, 625-568-9300, ext. 100 for defendant and moving party Sagepoint Cleaners, Inc.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SAGEPOINT CLEANERS, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue IS DENIED; SAN FRANCISCO IS A PROPER VENUE BECAUSE THE CONTRACT WAS FORMED HERE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND ARGUE. THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT INTERTAIN ARGUMENT ON THE MATTER. Opposing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Continued To Aug-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
